attachments.text:
You can try these basic steps to reinstall Windows 11 safely:

Option 1: Reset from Settings (easiest)

Go to Settings → System → Recovery → Reset this PC

Choose Keep my files or Remove everything, then follow the prompts.

Option 2: Reinstall using Microsoft’s official tool

On another working PC, download the Windows 11 Media Creation Tool from Microsoft’s website.

Create a bootable USB (8…
